title: Jim Ward (voice actor)
content:
{{Top|rwp|notoc=1}}
{{Otheruses|James|more=Jim|more2=Kevin}}
{{Youmay|Jim Ward, the voice actor|[[Jim Ward (Lucasfilm)|Jim Ward]], Senior Vice President of Lucasfilm|linebreak=1}}
{{Person
|image=[[File:JimWard-IMDB.jpg]]
|name=Jim Ward
|birth=[[May 19]], [[1950s|1959]]<ref name="HollywoodReporter">{{WebCite|url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/tv/tv-news/jim-ward-dead-fairly-oddparents-ratchet-clank-1236448605/|text=Jim Ward, Voice Actor on ‘Fairly OddParents,’ ‘Ratchet & Clank’ and Lots More, Dies at 66|author=Mike Barnes|date=2025-12-10|work=[[Wikipedia:The Hollywood Reporter|The Hollywood Reporter]]|archivedate=20251212144342}}</ref>
|death=[[December 10]], [[2025]]<ref name="HollywoodReporter" />
|listedpronouns=<!--Only include pronouns if they have been explicitly specified by the individual to which this article pertains.-->
|nationality=American
|occupation=[[Wikipedia:Voice acting|Voice artist]]<ref name="Dark Empire">[[Dark Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Empire '' audio drama]]</ref>
|companies=
|website=
}}
'''James "Jim" Kevin Ward''' is an [[Wikipedia:Voice acting|voice artist]] who voiced [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[Kam Solusar]], and [[Sedriss QL]] in the ''[[Dark Empire: The Collector's Edition]]''<ref name="Dark Empire Collectors">''[[Dark Empire: The Collector's Edition]]''</ref> as well as [[Arca Jeth]] in the [[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]].<ref name="Dark Lords of the Sith">[[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]]</ref> Ward would go on to voice various background characters in a number of ''[[Star Wars]]'' video games such as [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]]<ref name=" Episode I">[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars: The Phantom Menace'']]</ref> and ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''.<ref name="KOTOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>

Ward is known for his voice work in cartoons like ''[[Wikipedia:The Fairly OddParents|The Fairly Odd-Parents]]'', ''[[Wikipedia:Mighty Mouse: The New Adventures|Mighty Mouse: The New Adventures]]'', and ''[[Wikipedia::Xyber 9: New Dawn|Xyber 9]]'', as well as video-game voice work for ''[[Wikipedia:EverQuest II|EverQuest II]]'', ''[[Wikipedia:Call of Duty (video game)|Call of Duty]]'', and many others.<ref name="Ratchet & Clank announcement">{{WebCite|url=https://www.playstationlifestyle.net/2021/05/12/ratchet-clank-jim-ward|text=Ratchet & Clank: Rift Apart Won’t Feature Jim Ward as Captain Qwark Due to Illness|author=Rebecca Smith|date=2021-04-12|work=[https://www.playstationlifestyle.net PlayStation LifeStyle]|archivedate=20240303062322}}</ref>

In [[2021]], Ward was diagnosed with both COVID-19 and Alzheimer's.<ref name="Facebook">{{Facebook|username=profile.php?id=100028975344523|url=permalink.php?story_fbid=10159798790686977&id=53193901976|name=Jim Ward|date=2021-02-25|archivefile=File:JimWard-Illness.png}}</ref> He died on [[December 10]], [[2025]].<ref name="HollywoodReporter" />
